definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Who is that person?]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como pronombre interrogativo para preguntar sobre una persona.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as an interrogative pronoun to ask about a person.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Que / Quien / El cual (para personas)]
definitions.usage_example: The man who called me is here.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: The man who called me is here.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como pronombre relativo para introducir una cláusula sobre una persona.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a relative pronoun to introduce a clause about a person.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: He gave me the book.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: El pronombre de la 1ª persona singular como objeto.]
definitions.usage_context_es: The pronoun for the 1st person singular as the object.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: What is your name?]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como palabra interrogativa para pedir información (elección abierta).]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as an interrogative word to ask for information (open choice).

definitions.usage_example: I don't know what to do.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: I don't know what to do.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como pronombre relativo para referirse a 'la(s) cosa(s) que'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a relative pronoun to refer to 'the thing(s) that'.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Le / Lo / A él]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: I called him yesterday.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: El pronombre de la 3ª persona singular (masculino) como objeto.]
definitions.usage_context_es: The pronoun for the 3rd person singular (male) as the object.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Which color do you prefer?]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como palabra interrogativa para preguntar sobre una elección limitada.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as an interrogative word to ask about a limited choice.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Que / El cual / La cual]
definitions.usage_example: The car which is red is mine.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: The car which is red is mine.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como pronombre relativo para introducir una cláusula sobre una cosa.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a relative pronoun to introduce a clause about a thing.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: He is waiting for us.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: El pronombre de la 1ª persona plural como objeto.]
definitions.usage_context_es: The pronoun for the 1st person plural as the object.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Los / Las / Les / A ellos/as]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: I don't know them.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: El pronombre de la 3ª persona plural como objeto.]
definitions.usage_context_es: The pronoun for the 3rd person plural as the object.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: You are my friend.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: El pronombre de la 2ª persona (el oyente) como sujeto.]
definitions.usage_context_es: The pronoun for the 2nd person (the listener) as the subject.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Te / Ti / Le / A usted / Les / A ustedes (Objeto)]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: I will help you.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: El pronombre de la 2ª persona (el oyente) como objeto.]
definitions.usage_context_es: The pronoun for the 2nd person (the listener) as the object.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: It is cold outside.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: El pronombre de la 3ª persona singular (cosa/animal) como sujeto.]
definitions.usage_context_es: The pronoun for the 3rd person singular (thing/animal) as the subject.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: I don't understand it.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: El pronombre de la 3ª persona singular (cosa/animal) como objeto.]
definitions.usage_context_es: The pronoun for the 3rd person singular (thing/animal) as the object.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: La / Le / A ella (Objeto)]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: El pronombre de la 3ª persona singular (femenino) como objeto.]
definitions.usage_context_es: The pronoun for the 3rd person singular (female) as the object.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Su / Sus (Posesivo de ella)]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: This is her book.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: El determinante posesivo de la 3ª persona singular (femenino).]
definitions.usage_context_es: The possessive determiner for the 3rd person singular (female).
